message.content:
You are a senior code reviewer. Review the following changes for COMP018 (Build List.Item.Detail inline detail panel). The task is to add a `showDetail` and `detail` prop to the List component, enabling an inline split layout (list 40% + detail 60%) with a slide-in animation for the detail panel.

Files changed:
1. `src/components/list/list.tsx` — Added `showDetail` and `detail` props. When `showDetail` is true, renders a `.list-detail-split` wrapper with the list at 40% and detail panel at 60%.
2. `src/components/list/list.scss` — Added `.list--with-detail`, `.list-detail-split`, `.list-detail-panel` classes with slide-in animation.
3. `src/components/detail/detail.scss` — Removed `.command-palette__body--has-detail` border-left rule (border now on `.list-detail-panel`).
4. `src/components/command_palette/command_palette.scss` — Removed `.command-palette__body--has-detail` flex override on `.command-palette__list-container`.
5. `src/App.tsx` — Refactored root view to use List's new `showDetail` and `detail` props instead of manual split layout.

Read ALL changed files and review for:
- Correctness and completeness of implementation
- Any bugs or regressions
- CSS specificity or layout issues
- Missing ARIA/accessibility concerns
- Whether the animation is appropriate
- Whether any existing functionality was broken
- Whether the Detail component still renders correctly inside the new `.list-detail-panel`
- Any missed cleanup of old code
- Consistency with existing patterns in the codebase

Provide specific actionable feedback only. No generic praise.

content.text: I'll start by reading all the changed files and understanding the existing codebase patterns.
Now let me check the Detail component, the list index file, and related patterns.
Now let me check the git diff to see exactly what changed, including any removed code.

input.description: Check what files changed in last commit

content.text: Now let me check how the `detail` variable is derived in App.tsx and whether any other views use the old `command-palette__body--has-detail` pattern.
Good, the old class is fully removed. Let me check if other views (like clipboard_history, file_search) also use the List+Detail split pattern, since they were also changed in this commit.
